description_long: This is a modern, built-in induction cooker with a sleek black glass front panel and a rectangular shape. The front features a large, centrally positioned window, likely for monitoring food, surrounded by a glossy black frame. To the right of the window is a vertical control panel with a digital display at the top, several buttons, a rotary knob, and labeled settings for various cooking functions. The surface is smooth and reflective, with minimalistic design elements and subtle branding at the bottom center. The side views reveal a very slim profile, indicating a compact, wall-mounted or built-in installation. The overall appearance is high-tech and suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or communal cooking spaces.
description: A sleek, black induction cooker with a glass front, digital controls, and a large viewing window. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a slim profile and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large window, digital display, control panel with buttons and knob, and subtle branding.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the extremely slim profile and protruding control knobs.
description_view_2: Top-down angled view highlighting the flat glass surface, control panel layout, and window placement.
description_view_3: Right side view, again showing the slim profile and the side of the control panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a series of buttons and a rotary knob below. Labels and icons are present next to the controls, with indicator lights integrated into the panel.
